title: OpenBudget Miscellaneous Resource Index
description: Schema for misc.json stored in the main GitLab snippet. An index of miscellaneous resources (JSON schemas, documentation) hosted alongside the pipeline data.

name.description: Human-readable name for this miscellaneous resource collection.

link.description: Human-readable URL to this snippet on the GitLab web interface.

api.description: Full GitLab v4 API URL of this snippet.

content.description: List of individual miscellaneous resource entries (schemas, documentation, etc.).

type.description: MIME-like type identifier for the resource.

link.description: Raw URL to the resource file.

lastUpdate.description: ISO 8601 date of the last update.

comment.description: Optional human-readable description of the resource.
